## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is coherent and contains no unrelated work.
- [ ] I reviewed my own diff.
- [ ] Relevant lint, typecheck, tests, and verification pass.
- [ ] UI was inspected in the running product when applicable.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes received the appropriate review.
- [ ] Documentation matches reality.
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive values were committed.
- [ ] All blocking review conversations are resolved before merge.
